# Wayside Church

Wayside Church is a local Christian church in Charlton, Massachusetts.

Website: https://wayside.church/

Address: 6 Haggerty Rd, Charlton, MA 01507

Phone: (508) 434-0401

Sunday Worship: 10:00 AM

Coffee and Discipleship: 9:00 AM

Mission: Wayside Church is a community dedicated to seeing individuals, families, communities, and cities radically transformed by the Gospel of Jesus Christ.

## Key Pages

- Home: https://wayside.church/
- Church in Charlton, MA: https://wayside.church/church-in-charlton-ma/
- Plan a Visit: https://wayside.church/plan-a-visit/
- Start Here: https://wayside.church/start-here/
- Families: https://wayside.church/families/
- Teaching: https://wayside.church/teaching/
- About: https://wayside.church/about/
- Ministries: https://wayside.church/ministries/
- Contact: https://wayside.church/contact/
- Giving: https://wayside.church/giving/
- Newsletter: https://wayside.church/newsletter/

## Summary

Wayside Church gathers Sundays in Charlton, MA for worship, Bible teaching, prayer, fellowship, and discipleship. Guests, families, seekers, children, youth, and people returning to church are welcome to visit at their own pace.
